approvalSource: Steve gave GREEN LIGHT for the revised PLAIN-ENGLISH-SWEEP-001 plan after it added the 60-entry coverage floor, per-route/per-viewport manual pass/fail review, and explicit protection for IDs, selectors, API shapes, routes, data contract keys, source IDs, card IDs, table names, proof commands, and source-contract strings.
notes: Approval covers only the PLAIN-ENGLISH-SWEEP-001 copy-only Foundation operator wording sweep. It does not approve UI redesign, layout polish, Recent Work redesign, source expansion, Strategy, Scoper, Agent Factory, corpus, research, or action-review work.
